mapper.select: SELECT SUBJ_CL_ID, SUBJ_CL_NM, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY REG_DT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION (SUBJ_CL_NM, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT) VALUES (#{subjClNm}, 'Y', #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION SET SUBJ_CL_NM = #{subjClNm}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSDATE WHERE SUBJ_CL_ID = #{subjClId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUBJECT WHERE SUBJ_CL_ID = #{subjClId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT SUBJ_ID, SUBJ_CL_ID, SUBJ_NM, USE_YN, SUBJ_EXPLN_CN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM SUBJECT WHERE SUBJ_CL_ID = #{subjClId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY REG_DT ASC
SELECT SUBJ_ID, SUBJ_CL_ID, SUBJ_NM, USE_YN, SUBJ_EXPLN_CN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM SUBJECT WHERE SUBJ_ID = #{subjId} AND SUBJ_CL_ID = #{subjClId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUBJECT (SUBJ_CL_ID, SUBJ_NM, SUBJ_EXPLN_CN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT) VALUES (#{subjClId}, #{subjNm}, #{subjExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE SUBJECT SET SUBJ_NM = #{subjNm}, SUBJ_EXPLN_CN = #{subjExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSDATE WHERE SUBJ_ID = #{subjId} AND SUBJ_CL_ID = #{subjClId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE WHERE SUBJ_ID = #{subjId}
